day4_after_start.name: Me
day4_after_start.text: *After school. This is Day 4. The 'five days' Seolhwa mentioned... tomorrow is the last day.*

day4_after_start_2.name: Han Sea
day4_after_start_2.text: "{name}, want to come to the student council room again today? I bought new snacks."

day4_after_start_3.name: Me
day4_after_start_3.text: *...Knowing now what's behind Sea's smile, that smile looks different.*

day4_after_start_4.name: Me
day4_after_start_4.text: *The basement. The stairs that were in Yuna's camera. What Seolhwa carved on the rooftop: 'The answer is in the basement.' Everything points to the same place.*

day4_after_choice.name: Me
day4_after_choice.text: *Or... should I follow Sea and ask for the truth directly? Or organize the evidence I've gathered so far?*

day4_after_basement.name: Me
day4_after_basement.text: *I told Sea "I'll be right back" and slipped away.*

day4_after_basement_2.name: Me
day4_after_basement_2.text: *I head toward the old building. I need to find the stairs from Yuna's camera.*

day4_after_basement_3.name: Me
day4_after_basement_3.text: *The old building is unused for classes. The lighting is dim. Half the fluorescent lights are off.*

day4_after_basement_4.name: Me
day4_after_basement_4.text: *I walk down the corridor. Only my footsteps echo. Thud. Thud. Thud.*

day4_after_basement_5.name: Me
day4_after_basement_5.text: *...Here. At the end of the corridor there's a door. 'Authorized Personnel Only' sign. Same location as the stairs in the camera photo.*

day4_after_basement_6.name: Me
day4_after_basement_6.text: *A rusted door. It had a padlock, but... it's broken. Someone has been here before. Yuna? Or Seolhwa?*

day4_after_basement_7.name: Me
day4_after_basement_7.text: *I opened the door. Creak. The sound echoes through the corridor. I thought my heart had stopped.*

day4_after_basement_8.name: Me
day4_after_basement_8.text: *Stairs continue downward. Dark. A damp smell rises. A faintly metallic... disinfectant smell. ...I go down. One step. One step. I press my hand against the wall. The wall is cold. Damp.*

day4_after_basement_9.name: Me
day4_after_basement_9.text: *The stairs ended. One more door. It's open. ...The basement. Fluorescent lights flicker. Stzzt. Stzzt. Each time the light comes in, the interior is visible.*

day4_after_basement_10.name: Me
day4_after_basement_10.text: ***Beds. Multiple. Medical beds. Leather straps on the armrests.***

day4_after_basement_11.name: Me
day4_after_basement_11.text: ***Medical equipment. Monitors. Cabinets filled with chemicals. Syringes arranged in rows.***

day4_after_basement_12.name: Me
day4_after_basement_12.text: *...This isn't a nurse's office. This is... a laboratory.*

day4_after_basement_13.name: Me
day4_after_basement_13.text: *My hands are shaking. My legs are shaking. I want to run out. But I have to see. To the end.*

day4_after_basement_14.name: Me
day4_after_basement_14.text: *A chart hanging on the wall. It reads 'Subject Response Records.' Names and numbers listed. Subject #1... #3... #7... #12... Most with a red X beside the names. 'Memory reconstruction failed,' 'Side effects: personality dissociation,' 'Processing complete'...*

day4_after_basement_15.name: Me
day4_after_basement_15.text: *#7 — Lee Seolhwa. Beside the X there's a note: 'Adverse effect. Retained all memories. Containment impossible. Final processing executed.' ...Seolhwa.*

day4_after_basement_16.name: Me
day4_after_basement_16.text: *I opened a desk drawer. A pile of documents. My hands are shaking so badly I can barely hold them. 'Memory Manipulation Protocol — ver.4.2'*

day4_after_basement_17.name: Me
day4_after_basement_17.text: *'Transfer Student Acquisition Procedures: Sever ties with original school → Induce adaptation to new environment → Gradual drug administration over 5 days → Memory reconstruction → Compliance verification'*

day4_after_basement_18.name: Me
day4_after_basement_18.text: *'Board Approved: Special Autonomous Behavioral Correction Program for Maladjusted Students (Internal Codename: Nevergrad) — Cognitive Restructuring Research for Complete Compliance' ...A behavioral correction program. Just reading the name it sounds like a normal welfare initiative. Codename 'Nevergrad.' This school's name and... the experiment's true name.*

day4_after_basement_19.name: Me
day4_after_basement_19.text: *I unfolded another document. 'Subject #13 — In Progress.' A photo is attached. ...My photo. My legs gave out. I had to lean against the wall. Struggling to breathe. ...Number 13. My number. They were targeting me from the start...*

day4_after_basement_20.name: Me
day4_after_basement_20.text: *...! From the corner, a sound. A small moan. Someone is here. The fluorescent light flickers. As the light came in, I saw someone lying in the corner.*

day4_after_basement_22.name: Me
day4_after_basement_22.text: *It's Yuna. Collapsed on a bed in the corner.*

day4_after_basement_24.name: Me
day4_after_basement_24.text: *I approached. Yuna's face is pale. Her lips are cracked. The area under her eyes is darkly sunken. Needle marks on her arm. Multiple. From fresh to old. ...Yuna didn't 'transfer.' She was here. From the start.*

day4_after_basement_25.name: Yuna
day4_after_basement_25.text: "...Senpai, we need to... get out of here. Quickly..."

day4_after_basement_26.name: Me
day4_after_basement_26.text: *Yuna grabs my sleeve. Her hand has no strength.*

day4_after_basement_timer.name: Yuna
day4_after_basement_timer.text: "They're... coming soon. Every day at this time..."

day4_after_basement_rescue.name: Me
day4_after_basement_rescue.text: *I put Yuna's arm over my shoulder. She's light. How many days has she been without food?*

day4_after_basement_rescue_4.name: Me
day4_after_basement_rescue_4.text: *I found another exit on the opposite side. There's a small door beside the ventilation shaft. Looks like it leads outside.*

day4_after_basement_rescue_5.name: Me
day4_after_basement_rescue_5.text: *Supporting Yuna, I opened the door and slipped out into the darkness.*

day4_after_basement_hide.name: Me
day4_after_basement_hide.text: *I hid behind the cabinet. I signaled to Yuna. She nods.*

day4_after_basement_hide_2.name: Me
day4_after_basement_hide_2.text: *Footsteps approaching. The basement door opens. A long shadow falls under the fluorescent light.*

day4_after_basement_hide_3.name: Me
day4_after_basement_hide_3.text: *...It's Nurse Riin. She enters carrying a medicine tray. I held my breath. My heart hammers against my ribs. Will I be found? Will she hear my heartbeat?*

day4_after_basement_hide_4.name: Me
day4_after_basement_hide_4.text: *Nurse Riin takes medicine from the cabinet and... left. The door closes. Footsteps fade away.*

day4_after_basement_hide_5.name: Me
day4_after_basement_hide_5.text: *...We made it. I need to get Yuna out. Now.*

day4_after_sea_route.name: Me
day4_after_sea_route.text: *I followed Sea and came to the student council room.*

day4_after_sea_2.name: Me
day4_after_sea_2.text: *Sea locks the door. Click. ...She didn't used to lock it.*

day4_after_sea_3.name: Han Sea
day4_after_sea_3.text: "I wanted it to be just the two of us today."

day4_after_sea_4.name: Me
day4_after_sea_4.text: *Sea smiles. But her eyes... are different from usual. Eyes that look like they're being chased by something.*

day4_after_sea_6.name: Me
day4_after_sea_6.text: *Sea sits down in a chair. She looks up at me.*

day4_after_sea_7.name: Han Sea
day4_after_sea_7.text: "When {name} is with Yuna, your expression... isn't good. Same with Ms. Eunsu. And Nurse Riin."

day4_after_sea_force.name: Han Sea
day4_after_sea_force.text: "When you're with me, {name} looks most comfortable. ...Don't you only need to look at me?"

day4_after_sea_accept.name: Me
day4_after_sea_accept.text: *...What? The second choice... the text distorted and changed to the same text as the first. No matter which choice I pick, the same result. This isn't a 'choice.' It's a notification.*

day4_after_sea_accept_3.name: Me
day4_after_sea_accept_3.text: *Sea smiles. But this time the smile doesn't stop. It's as if her upturned mouth corners are frozen.*

day4_after_sea_crack.name: Me
day4_after_sea_crack.text: *...Those words gave me chills. The word 'person' sounded like 'object.' Sea looks out the window. The sun is setting.*

day4_after_sea_crack_2.name: Han Sea
day4_after_sea_crack_2.text: "...Sometimes I think about it. If I left here, where would I even go??"

day4_after_sea_crack_3.name: Me
day4_after_sea_crack_3.text: *Her voice changed. The firm voice is... wavering.*

day4_after_sea_crack_4.name: Han Sea
day4_after_sea_crack_4.text: "I don't know what the outside world is like. I've spent my whole life just doing what Ms. Eunsu told me."

day4_after_sea_crack_5.name: Han Sea
day4_after_sea_crack_5.text: "She told me to get close to the new students... to report on them."

day4_after_sea_crack_6.name: Me
day4_after_sea_crack_6.text: *Sea gripped her hands tightly on her knees. Her knuckles turned white.*

day4_after_sea_crack_7.name: Han Sea
day4_after_sea_crack_7.text: "...I thought that's all there was. I thought it was doing good things."

day4_after_sea_crack_8.name: Han Sea
day4_after_sea_crack_8.text: "But the students I reported on changed one by one. Seolhwa... disappeared entirely."

day4_after_sea_crack_9.name: Han Sea
day4_after_sea_crack_9.text: "...That's when I got scared for the first time."

day4_after_sea_crack_13.name: Han Sea
day4_after_sea_crack_13.text: "In the end you'll also... run away and leave me here alone."

day4_after_sea_crack_15.name: Me
day4_after_sea_crack_15.text: *Sea looks at me. Tears are pooling in her eyes.*

day4_after_sea_crack_16.name: Han Sea
day4_after_sea_crack_16.text: "I really fell for you. Not surveillance. Genuinely. This isn't an act. At least this... please believe me."

day4_after_sea_crack_17.name: Me
day4_after_sea_crack_17.text: *For a moment, fear flickered through Sea's eyes. Real emotion. Raw beneath the mask. Sea is also trapped in something. This school. Ms. Eunsu. The cage called 'a role.' It vanished quickly. Sea wipes her tears. Smiles. Puts the mask back on.*

day4_after_sea_crack_18.name: Han Sea
day4_after_sea_crack_18.text: "...Forget it. Forget everything I just said."

day4_after_sea_crack_19.name: Me
day4_after_sea_crack_19.text: *Sea hugged me. Her hands tighten around my back. I can barely breathe. ...I can tell this isn't a hug. This is obsession.*

day4_after_sea_crack_20.name: Me
day4_after_sea_crack_20.text: *But Sea's shoulders are trembling. Slightly. Quietly. This trembling is... not just obsession. It's fear. Fear of being alone if she lets go. ...Sea is also a victim. Understanding that doesn't make this situation less frightening.*

day4_after_evidence.name: Me
day4_after_evidence.text: *I stayed alone in the classroom. I took out everything I've gathered so far from my bag.*

day4_after_evidence_2.name: Me
day4_after_evidence_2.text: *Yuna's memory card. The camera found in the locker. The photo fragment. A photo of Seolhwa's message on the rooftop.*

day4_after_evidence_3.name: Me
day4_after_evidence_3.text: *I connect them one by one. Like puzzle pieces.*

day4_after_evidence_4.name: Me
day4_after_evidence_4.text: *Transfer students arrive. Adapted over 5 days. Drugs administered. Memories manipulated. If they comply, 'graduation.' If they resist... 'processing.'*

day4_after_evidence_5.name: Me
day4_after_evidence_5.text: *The transfer students didn't 'disappear' — they were 'processed.' Erase their memories, turn them into perfectly compliant students... A research facility funded by the board. This entire school.*

day4_after_evidence_6.name: Me
day4_after_evidence_6.text: *Ms. Eunsu 'manages' transfer students. Riin administers the drugs. Sea monitors and reports. ...And I am number 13. I photographed the evidence on my phone. Just in case. If this gets outside —*

day4_after_evidence_8.name: Me
day4_after_evidence_8.text: *I looked up. Ms. Eunsu is standing at the classroom door. ...When did she get there? I didn't hear footsteps. Ms. Eunsu's expression is complicated. Not angry, not sad... just exhausted.*

day4_after_evidence_9.name: Me
day4_after_evidence_9.text: *The teacher's gaze sweeps over the memory card and photo fragment on my desk.*

day4_after_evidence_timer.name: Me
day4_after_evidence_timer.text: *The teacher's gaze sweeps over the memory card and photo fragment on my desk.*

day4_after_evidence_run.name: Me
day4_after_evidence_run.text: *I jumped up from the chair. Swept the evidence into my bag and ran for the opposite door. Burst out into the corridor. Behind me, Ms. Eunsu's voice can be heard.*

day4_after_evidence_run_3.name: Me
day4_after_evidence_run_3.text: *She doesn't chase. Standing in place and speaking.*

day4_after_evidence_run_4.name: Homeroom Teacher
day4_after_evidence_run_4.text: "Come back, {name}. No matter how far you run, you'll only get hurt."

day4_after_evidence_run_5.name: Homeroom Teacher
day4_after_evidence_run_5.text: "You just need to do what your teacher says here. That's the safest."

day4_after_evidence_run_6.name: Me
day4_after_evidence_run_6.text: *Running down the corridor, I looked back. Ms. Eunsu is leaning against the doorframe. A pitying expression.*

day4_after_evidence_run_7.name: Me
day4_after_evidence_run_7.text: *...This person genuinely believes she's right. That's even more frightening. No time to think further. I have to run.*

day4_after_evidence_stay.name: Me
day4_after_evidence_stay.text: *My body froze. I can't move. ...I need to run, but my legs won't listen.*

day4_after_evidence_stay_3.name: Me
day4_after_evidence_stay_3.text: *Ms. Eunsu slowly enters the classroom. One step. One step.*

day4_after_evidence_stay_5.name: Me
day4_after_evidence_stay_5.text: *The teacher lets out a sigh. A long, deep sigh. An expression I've never seen before.*

day4_after_evidence_stay_6.name: Homeroom Teacher
day4_after_evidence_stay_6.text: "...I didn't want it to be like this from the start, {name}."

day4_after_evidence_stay_8.name: Homeroom Teacher
day4_after_evidence_stay_8.text: "It's alright, {name}. Your teacher will take care of everything."

day4_after_evidence_stay_9.name: Me
day4_after_evidence_stay_9.text: *The teacher's hand strokes my head. Gently. Warmly.*

day4_after_end.name: Me
day4_after_end.text: *'It's alright' carries two meanings. Whether it's comfort or a warning. ...Probably both. The teacher's hand is warm. That warmth is frightening.*
